svg.title: Cedar token pipeline architecture diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing Cedar's token pipeline from Figma input through normalization, canonical model, transform layer, and platform outputs to consumers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Figma input contract ADR-0003')
sendPrompt('How do option text tokens work in the Figma input?')
sendPrompt('How do spacing tokens come from Figma?')
sendPrompt('What are alias color tokens in Figma?')
sendPrompt('How does the schema mapping work in token-schema.json?')
sendPrompt('What is the four-file platform convention in ADR-0002?')
sendPrompt('How does governance validation work and what fails the build?')
sendPrompt('What does mergeColorVariants do?')
sendPrompt('What are color.option tokens and how are they structured?')
sendPrompt('What are alias tokens and how do color.modes tokens work?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in $extensions.cedar and what are all the sub-keys?')
sendPrompt('How does Style Dictionary v5 work in the Cedar pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How do the custom OKLCH formulas and culori work in the web transform?')
sendPrompt('What are the platform-specific actions in the transform layer?')
sendPrompt('How does type generation work for @rei/cdr-tokens?')
sendPrompt('How does the web CSS output work with OKLCH and hex fallbacks?')
sendPrompt('How do iOS colorsets work with Display P3?')
sendPrompt('What does the Android output produce and what is still pending?')
sendPrompt('What are the TypeScript types and docs metadata outputs?')
sendPrompt('How do Cedar Vue components consume design tokens?')
sendPrompt('How do web apps consume Cedar tokens?')
sendPrompt('How do iOS apps consume Cedar tokens?')
sendPrompt('What is the Android consumer integration plan?')
sendPrompt('What is the Tailwind integration ADR-0015?')
sendPrompt('What is the state layer system ADR-0006?')
sendPrompt('What accessibility requirements are planned in ADR-0009?')
sendPrompt('What is harmonic interval validation ADR-0011?')
sendPrompt('What is the CMYK print annotation plan?')
sendPrompt('What is the semantic typography gap in ADR-0004?')
